zh.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe於大約1144年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏塔其哈姆。她和Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham至少有4個女兒。她去世於1219年在英國肯特林沃爾德享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaufoe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name in the case of the Domesday Book tenants from Beaufour (Calvados), which is recorded as Belfou, Beaufou in 1100 and as Bellefai in about 1160 ( Tengvik ).

variants.name: Domesday Book
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places in Lancs, namely Bispham near Blackpool ( Bischopham, 1086 in Domesday Book ) or Bispham in Croston.

variants.name: Tengvik
meanings: Norman, English: locative name in the case of the Domesday Book tenants from Beaufour (Calvados), which is recorded as Belfou, Beaufou in 1100 and as Bellefai in about 1160 ( Tengvik ).

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe was born about 1144, in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. She had at least 4 daughters with Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham. She died in 1219, in Ringwould, Kent, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe est née environ 1144, à Thatcham, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a eu au moins 4 filles avec Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham. Elle est décédée en 1219, à Ringwould, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe wurde um 1144 in Thatcham, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hatte mit Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham mindestens 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1219 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Ringwould, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe è nata il circa 1144 nel Thatcham, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei avuto almeno 4 figlie con Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham. Morì nel 1219, nel Ringwould, Kent, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoeは約1144年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアサトチャムで生まれた。彼女はFulk Beauffou Lord of Thatchamとの間に少なくとも4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1219年にイギリスケントリングウオウルドで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe(은)는 대략 1144년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 댓챔에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham(와)과 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 켄트 링보우드에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe nasceu aproximadamente 1144, em Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhas com Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham. Ela faleceu em 1219, em Ringwould, Kent, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe родилась около 1144 г. в местности тачам, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У неё было по крайней мере 4 дочери от Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham. Она умерла в 1219 г. в местности рингвоулд, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agatha de Beaufoe nació aproximadamente 1144, en Thatcham, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijas con Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham. Murió en 1219, en Ringwould, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
